args.content:
Hawaii Packing List
Emma Johnson's Vacation — June 10–20, 2024

============================================================
CLOTHING
============================================================
- Swimwear (2–3 swimsuits for beach days & water activities)
- Casual outfits (t-shirts, shorts, sundresses, light layers)
- Light jacket or hoodie (for cooler evenings)
- Comfortable walking shoes / sandals
- Hiking boots or trail shoes

============================================================
BEACH & WATER ACTIVITIES
============================================================
- Beach towel
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins — if not renting)
- Waterproof phone pouch / dry bag
- Rash guard or swim shirt

============================================================
HIKING GEAR (Diamond Head & North Shore)
============================================================
- Daypack / small backpack
- Reusable water bottle
- Hat or cap for sun protection
- Moisture-wicking shirts & shorts
- Sunglasses

============================================================
TOILETRIES & HEALTH
============================================================
- Sunscreen (reef-safe, SPF 30+)
- Aloe vera gel / after-sun lotion
- Insect repellent
- Personal medications
- Basic first-aid kit (band-aids, pain relievers)

============================================================
ELECTRONICS & MISC
============================================================
- Camera (with extra memory cards & charger)
- Phone & charger / portable power bank
- Travel adapter (if needed)
- Headphones / earbuds

============================================================
TRAVEL DOCUMENTS & ESSENTIALS
============================================================
- Passport / ID
- Flight tickets & boarding passes
- Hotel reservation confirmation
- Travel insurance documents
- Credit cards & some cash
- Printed itinerary

============================================================
ADDITIONAL ITEMS
============================================================
- Reusable shopping bag (for Ala Moana Center)
- Luau outfit / slightly dressier attire
- Book or e-reader (for relaxation day)
- Snacks for the road trip to North Shore

Safe travels and enjoy Hawaii! 🌺

All done! Here's a summary of what I did:

1. **Found the source document** — `vacation-plans.docx` contained Emma's Hawaii itinerary (June 10–20, 2024) with a basic packing list.

2. **Created `hawaii-packing-list.docx`** — Based on the original list and the planned activities (beach days, snorkeling, hiking Diamond Head, Pearl Harbor, North Shore road trip, luau, kayaking, shopping, etc.), I organized an expanded packing list into these categories:
   - Clothing
   - Beach & Water Activities
   - Hiking Gear
   - Toiletries & Health
   - Electronics & Misc
   - Travel Documents & Essentials
   - Additional Items

3. **Shared with `john.doe@gmail.com`** — with **read-only** permissions, so John can view the list but not edit it.
